Notability.Summary: Technology entrepreneur who founded Braintree, Kernel and Project Blueprint, the highly publicized quantified-self longevity program.

Sources.Title: Bryan Johnson — full Labcorp results for the 1 April 2025 draw

TranscriptionNotes: The self-published report identifies Bryan Johnson, states age 47, and gives the single fasting collection date used here. The redacted date of birth was neither reconstructed nor stored.

The report gives cardiac C-reactive protein as below 0.15 mg/L. The stored value is the published assay limit, following the World Cup detection-limit rule; it is not presented as an exact measured concentration.
Albumin was converted from g/dL to g/L by multiplying by 10.
Creatinine was converted from mg/dL to µmol/L by multiplying by 88.4.
Glucose was converted from mg/dL to mmol/L by multiplying by 0.0555.
